# PermissionGuard

> PermissionGuard is a mobile app permission and privacy risk analyzer. It scores Android-style permissions with a real rule-based engine, flags dangerous permission combinations and reveals exactly what personal data an app can access.

PermissionGuard is an educational tool for understanding the privacy and security implications of the permissions a mobile app requests. It is not affiliated with Google or Android.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of PermissionGuard and how it analyzes app permission risk.
- [Manual Analysis](/manual): Pick permissions from grouped, categorized cards and instantly score the risk.
- [Manifest Analysis](/manifest): Paste a raw manifest or permission list to parse, normalize and analyze it.
- [Permission Dictionary](/dictionary): A knowledge base of each permission — what it allows, the data it exposes and why it can be dangerous.
- [Reports Dashboard](/dashboard): Browse, search and filter saved permission analysis reports.
